channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: UK Identified as Most Non-Compliant with Global Nuclear Weapons Ban
item.description: The United Kingdom has been ranked as the worst violator of the Treaty on the Prohibition of Nuclear Weapons (TPNW) in the 2026 Nuclear Weapons Ban Monitor report by Norwegian People's Aid. The report...

item.title: US Justice Department charges former FBI director James Comey over Instagram post of seashells arranged as '86 47'
item.description: The US Justice Department, under acting Attorney General Todd Blanche, has filed criminal charges against former FBI director James Comey for allegedly threatening the life of President Donald Trump. ...

item.title: Key Considerations Before Committing to Expensive Private School Fees
item.description: In this article, financial adviser Sangram Rana discusses the important questions families should ask before enrolling their children in expensive private schools. Using a recent example of a couple f...

item.title: High Court rules transgenders cannot claim traditional congratulatory gifts
item.description: The Delhi High Court has clarified the legal position regarding the entitlement of transgender persons to traditional 'badhai', which are customary gifts or recognitions given during auspicious occasi...

item.title: Final Hours of Constance Githinji Before Her Tragic Death in Kileleshwa
item.description: Constance Githinji, a 22-year-old student from Murang'a University, tragically died after falling from the sixth floor of an apartment in Kileleshwa, Nairobi. She had met a 33-year-old man named Tony ...

item.title: UAE exits OPEC after 60 years, signalling shifts in global oil strategy and cartel influence
item.description: The United Arab Emirates has announced it will leave OPEC after six decades of membership, marking a significant turning point for the global oil market and the organisation’s cohesion. As OPEC’s thir...

item.title: Sara Duterte Impeachment Hearing Approaches Key Vote in House Committee
item.description: The House Committee on Justice is set to conduct a critical session on April 29, 2026, as lawmakers determine whether there is probable cause for impeachment complaints against Vice President Sara Dut...

item.title: Passi City Court Sheriff Dismissed for Soliciting Money from Litigant
item.description: A court sheriff in Passi City, Iloilo, Gerard Louie Garganera, has been officially dismissed for extortion, according to a Supreme Court ruling. The case involved Garganera allegedly asking for P56,00...

item.title: Enterprise bargaining shows signs of growth, but its impact on productivity remains uncertain
item.description: At a recent Australian Financial Review Workplace Summit, Employment and Workplace Relations Minister Amanda Rishworth highlighted a reported increase in enterprise bargaining activity since 2023, sug...

item.title: Government extends fuel levy relief on petrol and temporarily removes diesel levy
item.description: The South African government has decided to extend the R3 reduction on the general fuel levy for petrol until 2 June 2026 and effectively pause the diesel levy to alleviate rising fuel costs. Finance ...

item.title: Nyeri Family Appeals for Help to Locate Daughter Missing in Saudi Arabia Since 2020
item.description: A family in Nyeri County is in distress as they continue to search for their relative, Martha Nyaguthii Maina, who has been missing in Saudi Arabia since 2020. Martha was reportedly admitted to Aster ...

item.title: Bernard Parker aims to guide TS Galaxy in Nedbank Cup final
item.description: TS Galaxy's interim coach, Bernard Parker, has expressed confidence in his ability to lead the team through the Nedbank Cup final against Durban City and the remaining league matches. Parker, who took...

item.title: Tinubu Meets Plateau Officials to Discuss Security After Jos Attack
item.description: President Bola Tinubu on Tuesday hold private meeting wit Plateau State stakeholders led by Governor Caleb Mutfwang for the Presidential Villa, Abuja. Dis wah discussions na follow-up to im recent vis...

item.title: Understanding Cryptic Pregnancy: Signs, Risks, and What to Watch For
item.description: Sometimes, pregnancy no dey obvious at all, and some women fit dey carry their pikin without even knowing. Dis kind pregnancy dey called cryptic or stealth pregnancy. E fit happen if woman dey use bir...

item.title: Delhi HC judge recuses from Karti Chidambaram case; hearing rescheduled
item.description: On April 28, 2026, Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma of the Delhi High Court recused herself from hearing a petition filed by Congress MP Karti Chidambaram. The plea seeks to quash a First Information Repo...

item.title: Brown Mogotsi to seek recusal of evidence leader at Madlanga commission
item.description: Brown Mogotsi, who has previously described himself as a police intelligence agent, has requested that advocate Matthew Chaskalson be recused as evidence leader while he gives his testimony at the Mad...

item.title: Rajnath Singh urges unified action against terrorism at SCO defence ministers' meet
item.description: At the Shanghai Cooperation Organisation (SCO) defence ministers' meeting held in Bishkek, Kyrgyzstan, Defence Minister Rajnath Singh emphasised the urgent need for a unified approach to combat terror...

item.title: Woman killed by former husband in General Trias, Cavite
item.description: In a tragic incident in General Trias, Cavite, a 56-year-old woman identified as A.T. Atienza was fatally stabbed by her former husband. The attack reportedly took place in front of her new partner in...

item.title: Canadian Government Boosts Security Funding for Jewish Communities Amid Rising Threats
item.description: The Centre for Israel and Jewish Affairs (CIJA) has welcomed a significant increase in federal funding through the Canada Community Security Program, aimed at safeguarding Jewish communities across Ca...

item.title: Rappler Recognized for Citizen-Powered Flood Control Reporting at APAC Awards
item.description: Rappler’s initiative #FloodControlPH, which engages citizens to report suspicious flood control projects, won the gold award for “Best in Audience Engagement” at the Digital Media Awards Asia 2026 hel...
